zh.lifeSummary: 當John Browne於大約1511年出生在英國艾可時，他的父親Sir William Browne Lord Mayor of London in 150743歲，母親Alice Keble38歲。他於1530年與Anne Montgomery在英國結婚。他去世於1570年9月在英國倫敦享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾布洛瑟頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Browne于大约1511年出生在英国艾可时，他的父亲Sir William Browne Lord Mayor of London in 150743岁，母亲Alice Keble38岁。他于1530年与Anne Montgomery在英国结婚。他去世于1570年9月在英国倫敦享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾布洛瑟頓。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When John Browne was born about 1511, in Essex, England, his father, Sir William Browne Lord Mayor of London in 1507, was 43 and his mother, Alice Keble, was 38. He married Anne Montgomery in 1530, in England. He died in September 1570, in London, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Brotherton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.St Mary Aldermanbury, London, England: St Mary Aldermanbury, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Browne est né environ 1511, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Browne Lord Mayor of London in 1507, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Alice Keble, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Anne Montgomery en 1530, à Angleterre. Il est décédé en septembre 1570, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Brotherton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St Mary Aldermanbury, London, England: St Mary Aldermanbury, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Browne um 1511 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Browne Lord Mayor of London in 1507 43 und seine Mutter Alice Keble 38. Er hat 1530 in England Anne Montgomery geheiratet. Er starb im September 1570 im Alter von 60 Jahren in London, England und wurde in Brotherton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Anne Montgomery nel 1530, nel England. Morì nel settembre 1570, nel London, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Brotherton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.St Mary Aldermanbury, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 메리 알더먼버이
ko.lifeSummary: John Browne(이)가 대략 1511년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Browne Lord Mayor of London in 1507(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Keble(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1530년 영국에서 Anne Montgomery(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1570년 9월 영국 런던에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 브로더턴에 묻혔다.

pt.St Mary Aldermanbury, London, England: St Mary Aldermanbury, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Browne nasceu aproximadamente 1511, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Browne Lord Mayor of London in 1507, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Alice Keble, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Montgomery em 1530, em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1570, em London, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Brotherton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Mary Aldermanbury, London, England: ст мэри алдирманбури, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Browne родился около 1511 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Browne Lord Mayor of London in 1507 было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Keble, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Montgomery в 1530 г. в местности Англия. Он умер сентябрь 1570 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности бротиртон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
